component.name: MainScene
component.script:
sub init() m.aliasCount = 0 end sub
sub onSelected() print "onSelected" ' Direct reentrant assignment: aliasField's onChange runs synchronously (nested). m.top.aliasField = [1, 2] print "onSelected done" end sub
sub onAlias() m.aliasCount = m.aliasCount + 1 print "onAlias count="; m.aliasCount ' Self-write back to the same alwaysNotify field must NOT re-trigger onAlias. m.top.aliasField = m.top.aliasField end sub
